name: Fried Green Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: cut horizontally into 1/2 inch thick slices
1 egg white, beaten with 2 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a shallow dish, combine cornmeal, bread crumbs, paprika, salt, pepper, and cayenne (if using); set aside.
3. Lightly coat a baking sheet with vegetable cooking spray; set aside.
4. Dip each tomato slice in egg white mixture, then dredge in the cornmeal-bread crumb mixture to coat.
5. Place slices in a single layer on prepared baking sheet. Spray tops of slices with vegetable cooking spray.
6. Bake for 30 minutes, or until golden brown. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese during last 5 minutes of baking if desired.
7. Serve immediately. Makes 6 servings.
Per serving: 85 calories, 1 gram fat, 2 grams fiber.
